502 S Hickory St, Searcy, AR 72143, USA
This is The Orchard Project’s third community orchard located across from The Maple House Community Garden. Newly planted in the summer of 2019. Access: Public.
110 S Oak St, Searcy, AR 72143, USA

The Searcy Orchard Project has a small orchard open to the community that acts as a community garden with apples, blueberry, and gooseberry. 

Corner of oak and pleasure. Roughly 110 oak. Access: Public.
This is the location of The Maple House community Gardens. They have tons of fresh fruit and veg growing here. Awesome people and an awesome place. Access: Permitted by owner.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
